titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean William A. Hagan records24-1-120
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Laura Finkel and Kerry Gilfillan

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean William A. Hagan records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean

did.abstract: Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during William A. Hagan's tenure as dean.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: William A. Hagan was the fourth Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. His term ran from 1932-1959. Hagan also served on the administrative committee that governed the college from 1931-1932, after the death of the third dean, Pierre A. Fish. Also on that committee were Drs. Earl Sunderville and Raymond Russel Birch. Professor Myron G. Fincher served as Acting Dean from 1943-1944 while Dean Hagan was in Germany

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during William A. Hagan's tenure as dean. Hagan served as dean from 1932-1959, but the most recent material in this collection only dates to1950, so additional material may be located in the future and added to the collection. Some information about the intervening years may be found in collection # 24-01-1646, New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, 1959-1974.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p: RMC Collection # 24-01-1646, New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, 1959-1974
RMC Collection #s 24-1-482 amd 24-1-1516, William A. Hagan Papers.

arrangement.head: COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
arrangement.p: Organized in several chronological series based on the original order of the collection.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, #24-01-120. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
